overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking along a mountain trail. The clip progresses from a narrow rocky corridor to an exposed ridge with panoramic views of snow-capped mountains and valleys, then continues along a winding path with increasing vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain pass between large boulders

events.description: exits the narrow rocky corridor into open mountain ridge with panoramic valley views

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the rocky mountain pass, emerging toward the open ridge

entered.detail: large gray boulder formation framing the left side of the trail
massive rock wall on the right side of the narrow passage
evergreen tree visible above the left rock formation
distant snow-covered peaks visible through the gap ahead
narrow dirt and stone path winding between the rocks

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow mountain pass flanked by large rock formations. As the path opens up around 10 seconds, expansive views of snow-capped mountains become visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: exposed mountain ridge with steep valley drop

events.description: trail curves gently to the left along the mountainside contour

agents.ego_description: walking along the exposed ridge enjoying the panoramic mountain views

entered.detail: deep valley with forested slopes visible below the ridge line
individual evergreen trees dotting the right side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The character traverses an exposed mountain ridge with breathtaking views of the valley below and snow-capped peaks ahead. The rocky outcrops fall away as the path curves along the mountainside, revealing scattered pine trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding mountain trail with cliff face and pine forest

events.description: entering section with denser pine trees and closer rock walls on the right

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding trail as vegetation becomes denser and the path narrows

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff wall rising immediately to the right of the trail
cluster of pine trees growing closer to the path on the left side

segments.scene_description: The trail narrows and curves with a rocky cliff face rising on the right and pine forest growing denser on the left. The panoramic views shift to the left as the path winds deeper into the mountainous terrain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a confined rocky corridor into an expansive mountain ridge before winding back into a dense forest. It begins with the character walking through a narrow mountain pass flanked by large rock formations, which gradually opens up to reveal expansive views of distant snow-capped peaks. As the path curves along the mountainside, the rocky outcrops fall away to expose a breathtaking ridge overlooking a deep valley. The scene then shifts as the trail narrows again, with a steep cliff face rising on the right while the surrounding pine forest grows denser on the left. Finally, the panoramic vistas recede as the camera follows the winding path deeper into the rugged mountainous terrain.
